mapper.sql: hotel_id, hotel_name, city, address, star_level, phone, description, facilities, images, longitude, latitude, status, create_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_hotel (hotel_name, city, address, star_level, phone, description, facilities, images, longitude, latitude) VALUES (#{hotelName}, #{city}, #{address}, #{starLevel}, #{phone}, #{description}, #{facilities}, #{images}, #{longitude}, #{latitude})
